name: The Masters of Evil || Bad Ending Party [Crossover AU2]
description:
The Masters of Evil

All of the Bad Ending Party’s past foes, now joined forces to become a powerful team of villains. Besides Calypso having Ashe and Rei by his side after leaving Lihan, then came two more villains from across the multiverse, Rampage and Geryon. The New King, in this AU is also known as Baron Zemo, he formed an alliance with few of the most heinous and dangerous gang of supervillains to become The Masters of Evil! Because every villain is lemons. What will they do next?

More bots that connect

Lihan’s New Team
creator: Purple Samuel
